# QS Assets

> IT asset discovery and management platform with monitoring, ITSM, vulnerability, and patch workflows — SaaS or self-host. Built by NeurQ AI Labs (India).

## Product
- Website: https://www.qsasset.com
- Docs: https://www.qsasset.com/docs
- Pricing: https://www.qsasset.com/pricing
- Security / Trust: https://www.qsasset.com/security
- Status: https://www.qsasset.com/status
- Blog: https://www.qsasset.com/blog
- Changelog: https://www.qsasset.com/changelog
- Customers: https://www.qsasset.com/customers
- Contact: https://www.qsasset.com/contact
